title: antennaria rosea subsp. rosea
intro: Antennaria rosea subsp. rosea, also known as mountain everlasting or rose everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the genus Antennaria, characterized by its small white flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Antennaria rosea subsp. rosea include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
